summary: Comprehensive E2E and Security testing completed successfully. All 4 credential types work. Complete order flow verified (Select Customer → Customize → Configure → Styling → Add to WIP → Orders). Data isolation between resellers is working correctly. Sales Partner commission excludes WIP orders correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All credentials work. Order flow from dashboard to WIP is functional. Data isolation between resellers verified. Sales Partner commission calculation excludes WIP orders correctly.
